parameters.query:
SELECT "XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."NUM_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0", 
"XPAYCSSPJ"."XCODE_0", 
"XPAYCSSPJ"."BPRNAM_0", 
"XPAYCSSPJ"."FCY_0", 
"BPARTNER"."XCPT_0", 
"XPAYCSSPJ"."XACH_0", 
"XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATEC_0",
DATEDIFF(DAY, XPAYCSSPJ.XDATEC_0, GETDATE()) AS nbj
FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XPOHCSSPJ" "XPAYCSSPJ" 
LEFT OUTER JOIN "x3"."BASE1"."BPARTNER" "BPARTNER" 
ON "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"="BPARTNER"."BPRNUM_0"
WHERE   NOT ("XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T1821' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T1833' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2406' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2515' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2517' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2618' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2694' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2708' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3000' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3048' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3207' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3402' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3544' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3663' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3830' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3851' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T4375' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T4388' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T6448')
ORDER BY "XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."XCODE_0"

nodes.name: Liste Bons de commande Sans Pièces Jointes

parameters.query:
SELECT BASE1.XCOMFH.XNUM_0, BASE1.XCOMFH.XDATECMP_0, BASE1.XCOMFH.XDEM_0,BASE1.XCOMFH.XOBS_0,BASE1.XCOMFH.XOBSD_0,BASE1.XCOMFH.XDATC_0

,BASE1.XCOMFH.CREUSR_0, 
DATEDIFF(DAY, BASE1.XCOMFH.XDATC_0, GETDATE()) AS nbj

FROM     BASE1.XCOMFH 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  BASE1.AOBJTXT ON BASE1.XCOMFH.XNUM_0 = BASE1.AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0
where BASE1.AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 is null
				  order by XNUM_0

select datediff(Day,XDATCMD_0,GETDATE()) as nbj, * 
,(select top 1 XACH_0 from BASE1.PORDERQ  where POHNUM_0=XCMD_0)  as Acheteur
from BASE1.XDEPFACT 

where XFACT_0=''
and XCMD_0  not in (select XCMD_0 from BASE1.XDEPFACT  where XFACT_0<>'')
and XCMD_0  not in (select POHNUM_0  from BASE1.PORDERQ O   where LINCLEFLG_0=2  and RCPQTYSTU_0<QTYSTU_0)
and left(XCMD_0,3)<>'CBC'
and XFLGANN_0<>2 
order by XDATCMD_0  asc

nodes.name: Bons de commandes san facture fournisseur (30 jours)

parameters.query:
SELECT "XORVEPJ"."XDATC_0", "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0", "XORVEPJ"."XBPS_0", "XORVEPJ"."XCOD_0", "XORVEPJ"."XINT_0", "PAYMENTH"."NUM_0", "XORVEPJ"."XMNT_0", "PAYMENTH"."AMTCUR_0",
DATEDIFF(DAY, XDATC_0,GETDATE()) as nbj
 FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XORVEPJ" "XORVEPJ" LEFT OUTER JOIN "x3"."BASE1"."PAYMENTH" "PAYMENTH" ON "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0"="PAYMENTH"."XVIN_0"
 ORDER BY "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0"

SELECT "XORVEPJ"."XDATC_0", "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0", "XORVEPJ"."XBPS_0", "XORVEPJ"."XCOD_0", "XORVEPJ"."XINT_0", "PAYMENTH"."NUM_0", "PAYMENTH"."AMTCUR_0", "XORVEPJ"."XMNT_0",
DATEDIFF(DAY, XDATC_0,GETDATE()) as nbj
 FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XORVNPJ" "XORVEPJ" LEFT OUTER JOIN "x3"."BASE1"."PAYMENTH" "PAYMENTH" ON "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0"="PAYMENTH"."XOVI_0"
 ORDER BY "XORVEPJ"."XNUM_0"

elect PNHNUM_0,RTNDAT_0,BPSNUM_0,BPRNAM_0,CREUSR_0,DATEDIFF( DAY,XDATCPJ_0,GETDATE()) as nbj ,XDATCPJ_0 from BASE1.PRETURN   
where INVFLG_0<3 and XRETINT_0<>2

WITH 
-- ==========================================
-- 1. Définition de "Commande_1"
-- ==========================================
Commande_1 AS (
    SELECT L.XOBSER_0, L.XANND_0, L.XPERIOD_0
    FROM BASE1.XCTRDF2 L 
    LEFT JOIN BASE1.XNBDECF D 
        ON L.XANND_0 = D.XANDEC_0  
        AND L.XPERIOD_0 = D.XPERIOD_0 
        AND L.XOBSER_0 = D.XOBSER_0
    WHERE isnull(D.XOBSER_0, '') = ''
      AND L.XANND_0 = YEAR(getdate()) - 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT L.XOBSER_0, L.XANND_0, L.XPERIOD_0
    FROM BASE1.XCTRDF2 L 
    LEFT JOIN BASE1.XNBDECF D 
        ON L.XANND_0 = D.XANDEC_0  
        AND L.XPERIOD_0 = D.XPERIOD_0 
        AND L.XOBSER_0 = D.XOBSER_0
    WHERE isnull(D.XOBSER_0, '') = ''
      AND L.XANND_0 = YEAR(getdate())  
      AND L.XPERIOD_0 < MONTH(getdate()) 
),

-- ==========================================
-- 2. Définition de "Commande" (Requête Principale)
-- ==========================================
Commande AS (
    SELECT 
        L.XOBSER_0, 
        L.XANND_0, 
        L.XPERIOD_0,
        D.XOBSER_0  AS D_XOBSER_0,  -- Correspond à XOBSER_0(1)
        D.XANDEC_0  AS D_XANDEC_0,
        D.XPERIOD_0 AS D_XPERIOD_0, -- Correspond à XPERIOD_0(1)
        D.XNUM_0    AS D_XNUM_0
    FROM BASE1.XCTRDF2 L 
    LEFT JOIN BASE1.XNBDECF D 
        ON L.XANND_0 = D.XANDEC_0  
        AND L.XPERIOD_0 = D.XPERIOD_0 
        AND L.XOBSER_0 = D.XOBSER_0
)

-- ==========================================
-- 3. Requête finale combinant tout avec les formules
-- ==========================================
SELECT 
    C.XOBSER_0,
    C.XANND_0,
    C.XPERIOD_0,
    C.D_XOBSER_0,
    C.D_XANDEC_0,
    C.D_XPERIOD_0,
    C.D_XNUM_0,

    -- FORMULE DU MOIS : Convertit le numéro de la période en nom de mois
    DATENAME(month, DATEADD(month, C.XPERIOD_0 - 1, CAST('2000-01-01' AS datetime))) AS Nom_Du_Mois,

    -- FORMULE D'ETAT
    CASE 
        WHEN C.D_XPERIOD_0 IS NULL THEN 'Non Déclaré' 
        ELSE 'Déclaré' 
    END AS Etat,

    -- FORMULE DE MISE EN FORME (Couleurs)
    CASE 
        -- Si l'état est "Déclaré"
        WHEN (CASE WHEN C.D_XPERIOD_0 IS NULL THEN 'Non Déclaré' ELSE 'Déclaré' END) = 'Déclaré' 
            THEN 'Vert (227,255,227)'
        
        -- Si non déclaré mais présent dans Commande_1
        WHEN C1.XPERIOD_0 IS NOT NULL 
            THEN 'Jaune (crYellow)'
            
        -- Sinon pas de couleur
        ELSE 'Aucune (crNoColor)' 
    END AS Indicateur_Couleur

FROM Commande C
-- Application du lien visible sur votre image (Les 3 flèches)
LEFT JOIN Commande_1 C1 
    ON C.XOBSER_0 = C1.XOBSER_0 
   AND C.XANND_0 = C1.XANND_0 
   AND C.XPERIOD_0 = C1.XPERIOD_0

where C.D_XPERIOD_0 is null
-- Ordre de tri de votre "Deuxième commande"
ORDER BY 
    C.XANND_0, 
    C.XPERIOD_0;

SELECT "XPAYPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYPJ"."NUM_0", "XPAYPJ"."BPCNUM_0", "XPAYPJ"."XCODE_0", "XPAYPJ"."BPRCNAM_0", "XPAYPJ"."PAYTYP_0", "XPAYPJ"."DES_0", "XPAYPJ"."REF_0", "XPAYPJ"."AMTCUR_0",
DATEDIFF(DAY,XDATE_0, GETDATE()) as nbj
 FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XPAYPJ" "XPAYPJ"
 WHERE  "XPAYPJ"."XDATE_0">={ts '2022-01-01 00:00:00'}
 ORDER BY "XPAYPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYPJ"."XCODE_0"

SELECT "XPINCSSPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."NUM_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."BPSNUM_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."XCODE_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."BPRCNAM_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."FCY_0", "BPARTNER"."XCPT_0", "XPINCSSPJ"."XDTREG_0",
CASE 
    WHEN XPINCSSPJ.XDTREG_0 >= '2023-01-01' 
        THEN DATEDIFF(day, XPINCSSPJ.XDTREG_0, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
    ELSE 0 
END AS nbj
 FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XPINCSSPJ" "XPINCSSPJ" LEFT OUTER JOIN "x3"."BASE1"."BPARTNER" "BPARTNER" ON "XPINCSSPJ"."BPSNUM_0"="BPARTNER"."BPRNUM_0"
 WHERE  "XPINCSSPJ"."XDATE_0">={ts '2023-01-01 00:00:00'}
